hero.title: One shared place for your child — across homes
hero.description: You should not have to be the one who always remembers. Lina keeps the practical details — medical info, equipment, contacts, schedules — shared and up to date across both homes.

csSection.label: Care Schedule
csSection.title: Plan your care schedule together
csSection.description: Lina's interactive care schedule lets both parents plan and visualize how time is shared across weeks. See day splits, weekend patterns, and handover frequency — all in one clear view.

how.label: How it works
how.title: Set it up once. The rest is shared automatically.

step1.title: Create a shared space
step1.description: One parent sets up a space for the child. The other gets an invite to join. No complicated setup required.

step2.title: Add what matters
step2.description: Medical information, allergies, contacts, equipment lists — add it once, and it is there for both parents.

step3.title: No one needs to ask twice
step3.description: Updates are visible to both parents in real time. No more repeating yourself, or wondering if the other home has the latest.

features.label: Features
features.title: All the details, shared with the other home

threads.title: Threads
threads.description: Separate conversations for each topic — logistics, school, health. Nothing gets buried in one long chat.

messages.title: Messages
messages.description: Messages cannot be edited or deleted. Search conversations, mark what matters, and always have a clear record of what was agreed.

album.title: Shared album
album.description: A private album where both parents can share photos. The moments that happen in one home are visible in both.

features.more: Also included: contacts, equipment lists, child information, and care schedule — so both parents have what they need, wherever the child is.

problem.label: Why Lina
problem.title: When care is split across two homes, details get lost
problem.description: When plans, messages and photos live in different apps, important things fall through the cracks. Lina brings everything into one shared structure — calm, clear and predictable.

forWhom.forDescription: Parents who share care across two homes and want less friction in everyday cooperation. For those who value structure over noise and clarity over constant messaging.
forWhom.notDescription: Not a social network, not a general family chat, and not built for endless conversation. Lina is a focused tool designed specifically for cooperation around your child.

privacy.label: Privacy
privacy.title: Private by design
privacy.description: What happens in Lina stays between the two of you. No ads, no third parties, no algorithm deciding what you see. Your child's information is private — and that is how it should be.

point1.title: No advertising
point1.description: Your experience is never shaped by ads or commercial interests.

point2.title: No data sharing
point2.description: Your data stays yours. It is never shared with third parties.

point3.title: No algorithm
point3.description: You decide what you see — not an algorithm optimizing for engagement.

privacy.tagline: Structured for cooperation. Private by default.

cta.title: One safe line between two parents.
cta.description: Lina keeps the practical details organized and visible to both parents. Download and get started in minutes.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.intro: Have a question about Lina or need help with your account? We're here to help — reach out and we'll get back to you as soon as we can.
